pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh which places the official dwanko_run.tnz file at this exact path.
Task description and setup_task.sh which creates and enforces this exact output directory.
Task description and export_result.sh which explicitly expects the final sprite sheet to be saved at this path.
Task description explicitly mandates output frame width of 256 pixels, which is verified by the evaluation script.
Task description explicitly mandates output frame height of 256 pixels, which is verified by the evaluation script.
Task description mandates assembling the final sprite sheet in a 6-column grid, which is enforced by the verification logic checking width.
Checked the source file dwanko_run.tnz XML data which specifies 'framecount=72'. Thus, a minimum frame count of 10 is correctly verified as valid and achievable.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official 'dwanko_run.tnz' sample animation (which contains 72 frames) located at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. The agent is strictly required to output 256x256 pixel transparent PNG frames to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/spritesheet_frames/ (minimum 10 frames required) and then assemble them into a single 6-column sprite sheet at /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/spritesheet.png. All these constraints were confirmed via task specification and the environment's evaluation logic.
